_note: docs/46 Phase 0 (2026-07-12): god-service accretion ratchet. Every apps/api/src/modules file over maxLoc=600 at introduction is grandfathered at its then-current LOC + constructor-param count; both may only go DOWN (extractions lower them; a file dropping under 600 leaves the list). Growing a listed file, adding a ctor param to one, or pushing a new file past 600 fails the build gate — land the change as a sub-service/registered provider per docs/46 §4 instead, or bump this baseline in the same PR with a justification appended here (use-client precedent). 2026-07-13 merge of origin/main: projects.service.ts re-baselined 1163→1173 LOC — main's PROJ-19 earned-schedule feature (#735) landed on main before this ratchet existed there, so the growth predates the guard and is not new accretion by this branch; docs/46 Phase 4 lists projects for a later extraction round. 2026-07-13 tenant soft-delete (migration 0386): billing.service.ts re-baselined 1095→1102 LOC — surfacing the new deleted/deleted_by fields in listTenants()/getTenantDetail() (already-owned tenant read paths) plus the includeDeleted filter; the mutations themselves landed in the new tenant-lifecycle.service.ts provider, not appended here. 2026-07-13 tenant purge follow-up: extracted factoryResetTenant's fixpoint-delete loop into the shared apps/api/src/modules/billing/tenant-wipe.ts helper (reused by TenantLifecycleService.purgeTenant) — billing.service.ts SHRANK 1102→1079 LOC, baseline lowered accordingly. 2026-07-13 same PR: re-baselined 1079→1081 LOC surfacing purged/purged_by in listTenants()/getTenantDetail() (audit_log-preserving purge redesign after the product decision to never erase the ITGC-AC-16 chain). 2026-07-13 merge into the docs/46 Phase 4 branch: those billing.service.ts entries are gone because Phase 4c decomposed the facade to 369 LOC (off the list); the #744 soft-delete/purge read-path changes were ported into platform-admin.service.ts and the wipe refactor into tenant-provisioning.service.ts. 2026-07-13 PPM-A1 (PROJ-20): projects.service.ts re-baselined 1173→1180 LOC — 5 new one-line delegators (upsertResourceSkill/listResourceSkills/upsertResourceCalendar/listResourceCalendar/roleSupplyDemand) + 2 DTO interfaces, mirroring the existing addRateCard/resourceUtilization delegator pattern to the same projects-resourcing.service.ts sub-service (docs/38 §3, PR-2) — no new business logic in the facade itself. 2026-07-13 PPM-B1 (PROJ-21): projects.service.ts re-baselined 1180→1192 LOC — 4 new one-line delegators (getCalendar/setCalendar/addCalendarException/listCalendarExceptions) to the same projects-evm.service.ts sub-service, same thin-facade pattern as PPM-A1. projects.controller.ts crosses 600 LOC for the first time (601) and enters the grandfathered list — it is a pure route-declaration + Zod-schema file (no business logic; every handler is a one-line delegate to ProjectsService) that has simply accreted new static routes/DTOs across many PPM waves (resources/skills, resources/calendar, resources/role-demand, task dependencies/constraints, calendar/exceptions); splitting NestJS route declarations across multiple controller files buys little and was judged out of proportion for this PR — extraction candidate for a future docs/46-style pass if it keeps growing. 2026-07-13 PPM-B2 (PROJ-22): projects.service.ts re-baselined 1192→1198 LOC — 2 new one-line delegators (submitEtc/eacScenarios) to the same projects-evm.service.ts sub-service + 1 new DTO interface, same thin-facade pattern as PPM-A1/B1. projects.controller.ts re-baselined 601→620 LOC — 2 new static routes (POST :code/etc, GET :code/eac-scenarios) + 1 Zod schema (EtcBody), same pure route-declaration/no-business-logic nature as the prior entry. 2026-07-14 PPM-A2 (PROJ-23): projects.service.ts re-baselined 1198→1277 LOC (+79) — resourceLeveling(), a genuine composition method (not a one-line delegator like the prior entries) that spans BOTH existing sub-services — evmSvc.schedule() for per-task slack and project_resources/resource_calendar for the capacity ceiling — mirroring the facade's existing forecast() cross-sub-service composition (which already reads resourcing.resourceCapacity() directly); no new business logic duplicated in either sub-service, and no new table/migration. projects.controller.ts re-baselined 620→627 LOC — 1 new route (GET :code/resource-leveling), same pure route-declaration nature as prior entries. | PROJ-24 (2026-07-14): +2 projects.service.ts (1277->1279) + +7 projects.controller.ts (627->634) for the read-only change-order impact simulation — a thin facade delegator + one GET route; the simulation logic itself lives in projects-evm.service.ts (not baselined), matching the PROJ-20/21/22 precedent (the EVM sub-service is a ctor-body plain class, not a DI provider, so the delegator must sit on the facade). | PROJ-25 (2026-07-14): +15 projects.service.ts (1279->1294) + +47 projects.controller.ts (634->681) for the PPM Wave P4 portfolio selection scenarios — 6 thin facade delegators (create/list/get/upsertItem/removeItem/commit) + 3 DTO interfaces, and 6 controller routes + 3 Zod bodies; all business logic (what-if aggregation + maker-checker commit + over-envelope guard) lives in the NEW projects-portfolio.service.ts sub-service (not baselined, a ctor-body plain class like projects-evm/resourcing/wbs, so its delegators must sit on the facade), same thin-facade precedent as PROJ-20/21/22/24. | PROJ-26 (2026-07-14): +11 projects.service.ts (1294->1305) + +21 projects.controller.ts (681->702) for the PPM Wave P4 project phase-gate governance — 3 thin facade delegators (listPhaseGates/submitPhaseGate/decidePhaseGate) + 2 DTO interfaces, and 3 controller routes + 2 Zod bodies; all business logic (phase-ladder forward-only submit + GO/HOLD/KILL maker-checker decide, decider≠submitter) lives in the NEW projects-gate.service.ts sub-service (not baselined, a ctor-body plain class like projects-portfolio/evm/resourcing/wbs, so its delegators must sit on the facade), same thin-facade precedent as PROJ-20/21/22/24/25. | PROJ-27 (2026-07-14): +13 projects.service.ts (1305->1318) + +27 projects.controller.ts (702->729) for the PPM Wave P4 program benefits realization — 4 thin facade delegators (list/declare/recordMeasurement/confirm) + 3 DTO interfaces, and 4 controller routes + 3 Zod bodies; all business logic (realization aggregation + maker-checker benefit sign-off, confirmer≠author) lives in the NEW program-benefits.service.ts sub-service (not baselined, a ctor-body plain class like projects-gate/portfolio/evm/resourcing/wbs, so its delegators must sit on the facade), same thin-facade precedent as PROJ-20/21/22/24/25/26. | docs/49 SME edition full wiring (2026-07-15, merged over PROJ-27): +1 projects.service.ts (1318->1319) + +1 projects.controller.ts (729->730) — one import line each (assertMakerChecker / SelfApprovalBody) for the cross-cutting maker-checker seam; the three inline SoD throws in the service became one-line seam calls (LOC-neutral) and the logic lives in common/control-profile.ts, so this is the seam's fixed per-file cost, not accretion.
